data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of alerting the dispatcher/manager.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to alert the dispatcher/manager when the overtime threshold is exceeded. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for such alerts, but there is no direct evidence demonstrating that this requirement is implemented or validated, leading to a blockage in coverage.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the alerting mechanism for the dispatcher/manager.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the alerting requirement.
